allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S "localhost\\SQLEXPRESS" -d SaffarDb -Q "IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='Users' AND COLUMN_NAME='DriverStatus'\) BEGIN ALTER TABLE Users ADD DriverStatus nvarchar\(max\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending'; UPDATE Users SET DriverStatus = 'Approved' WHERE Role = 'Driver' AND IsDriverApproved = 1; PRINT 'Column added and back-filled'; END ELSE PRINT 'Column already exists';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "localhost\\SQLEXPRESS" -d SaffarDb -No -Q "IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='Users' AND COLUMN_NAME='DriverStatus'\) BEGIN ALTER TABLE Users ADD DriverStatus nvarchar\(max\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending'; UPDATE Users SET DriverStatus = 'Approved' WHERE Role = 'Driver' AND IsDriverApproved = 1; PRINT 'Column added and back-filled'; END ELSE PRINT 'Column already exists';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "localhost\\SQLEXPRESS" -d SaffarDb -No -Q "IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='Users' AND COLUMN_NAME='DriverStatus'\) BEGIN ALTER TABLE Users ADD DriverStatus nvarchar\(max\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending'; EXEC\('UPDATE Users SET DriverStatus = ''Approved'' WHERE Role = ''Driver'' AND IsDriverApproved = 1'\); PRINT 'Column added and back-filled'; END ELSE PRINT 'Column already exists';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "localhost\\SQLEXPRESS" -d SaffarDb -No -Q "INSERT INTO __EFMigrationsHistory \(MigrationId, ProductVersion\) SELECT '20260416120527_AddDriverStatusToUser', '8.0.0' WHERE NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM __EFMigrationsHistory WHERE MigrationId = '20260416120527_AddDriverStatusToUser'\); SELECT MigrationId FROM __EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId DESC;")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 13392 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name,Path; Get-Process -Name 'dotnet','Saffar*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 13392 -Force; Stop-Process -Id 12216 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 18364 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process -Name 'Saffar*','dotnet' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name")
Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Get-Process -Id 13392 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output 'STILL RUNNING' } else { Write-Output 'PROCESS GONE' }")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); admin=[p for p in d['paths'] if '/admin' in p]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(admin\)\)\)")
